Vetted Engineering Standards

Our Production Technology Stack

We ship modern web products with a battle-tested toolchain — from Next.js and React 19 through SEO, accessibility, security scanning, and CI quality gates. Every layer is chosen for performance, maintainability, and enterprise-grade delivery.

Next.js 15Core Platform

App Router, SSR/SSG, and edge-ready production deployments.

React 19Core Platform

Concurrent rendering, server components, and modern UI patterns.

TypeScriptCore Platform

End-to-end type safety across apps, APIs, and shared libraries.

Tailwind CSSCore Platform

Utility-first styling with design tokens and responsive layouts.

next/fontCore Platform

Self-hosted, optimized fonts with zero layout shift.

shadcn/uiUI & Motion

Accessible, composable component primitives built on Radix UI.

MotionUI & Motion

Declarative React animations for polished micro-interactions.

GSAPUI & Motion

High-performance timeline animations for hero and scroll experiences.

Lucide ReactUI & Motion

Consistent, lightweight icon system across the product UI.

SonnerUI & Motion

Elegant toast notifications for form feedback and system alerts.

next-seoSEO & Content

Centralized metadata, Open Graph, and Twitter card management.

next-sitemapSEO & Content

Automated sitemap and robots.txt generation at build time.

schema-dtsSEO & Content

Type-safe JSON-LD structured data for rich search results.

MDXSEO & Content

Blog, docs, and marketing pages as code with embedded components.

ContentlayerSEO & Content

Typed content pipeline from Markdown and MDX into the app layer.

Fuse.jsSEO & Content

Fast client-side fuzzy search for docs, blogs, and resources.

next-pwaCore Platform

Offline-ready progressive web app support and install prompts.

react-hook-formCore Platform

Performant forms with minimal re-renders and excellent DX.

zodCore Platform

Runtime schema validation synced with TypeScript types.

VitestTesting & Quality

Unit and integration tests with Vite-speed feedback loops.

PlaywrightTesting & Quality

Cross-browser E2E coverage for critical user journeys.

axe-coreTesting & Quality

Automated accessibility regression checks in CI pipelines.

ESLintTesting & Quality

Next.js-aligned lint rules for consistent code standards.

BiomeTesting & Quality

Fast formatter and linter for zero-friction developer workflows.

JSCPDTesting & Quality

Duplicate code detection to keep the codebase DRY.

KnipTesting & Quality

Dead code and unused dependency pruning.

MadgeTesting & Quality

Circular dependency analysis across modules.

Dependency CruiserTesting & Quality

Architecture boundary enforcement and import graph validation.

SemgrepSecurity & CI

Static analysis for security anti-patterns and OWASP risks.

CodeQLSecurity & CI

Deep semantic code scanning for vulnerability classes.

GitleaksSecurity & CI

Secret scanning in commits, branches, and CI artifacts.

TrivySecurity & CI

Container and dependency vulnerability scanning.

Lighthouse CISecurity & CI

Performance, SEO, and best-practice budgets on every deploy.

Architecture Standards & Review

We combine advanced artificial intelligence pipelines, robust backend engineering, pixel-perfect UX/UI design systems, and hyper-targeted conversion funnels to scale businesses globally.
